== Notes for [[Item:Q57826|Q57826]] ==

Anussim Secretário dos Reis Católicos Prefeito (mayor) de Segóvia
--------------------
This is an extension of Senior Coronel Family;

The Perez Coronel Family Correios-Mores, Condes and Marqueses de Penafiel
from Portugal c.1450

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
